name: Network Configuration Change Detected
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Khalaf Alasfoor
SIGMA Title: Network Configuration Change Detected
SIGMA Description: Detects changes to network configuration settings (e.g., IP address, DNS server, network adapter).

False positives:
- Admin or automated reconfiguration

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('4200', '4201', '4199', '6144') AQL filter query

when the event(s) were detected by one or more of WindowsAuthServer @ H360-DC2, WindowsAuthServer @ H360-DC3, WindowsAuthServer @ H360-TALLY, WindowsAuthServer @ H360FS, WindowsAuthServer @ SRV-APP-H360
TD_list: APPLY Network Configuration Change Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('4200', '4201', '4199', '6144') AQL filter query

AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of WindowsAuthServer @ H360-DC2, WindowsAuthServer @ H360-DC3, WindowsAuthServer @ H360-TALLY, WindowsAuthServer @ H360FS, WindowsAuthServer @ SRV-APP-H360
RED_list: Event name: Network Configuration Change Detected
